location.repository: St. Catherine's Monastery of the Sinai

note.value: Cataloging and imaging follows current sequence of folios as found in February 2014; alternate foliations are indicated for each folio
For the complete folios, there are different foliation systems in pencil, all incomplete and not corresponding to current sequence; the last two folios carry no foliation
The handwritten catalogers' notes in the cardboard manuscript wrapping yield no relevant information regarding foliation; the sleeves which contain the fragments are numbered 1 to 46
Burn marks; many folios badly eaten | All folios were pressed and flattened, some have white fibers attached

The cardboard wrapping contained an envelope of fragments of various sizes | In February 2014, large fragments from the envelope were placed in acrylic sleeves (frags. 1-25); small fragments were first placed in paper sleeves, then in acrylic sleeves (26-46)
